global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with promotional elements highlighting a special offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer with free delivery.

elements.label: red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'CraveLoop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: two overlapping circles
elements.description: Two overlapping circles are depicted in the center, suggesting a visual representation of a deal or offer.

elements.label: two overlapping circles
elements.description: Another set of two overlapping circles is shown, reinforcing the theme of the offer.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A smaller circle is positioned in the center, adding to the visual complexity of the offer.

elements.label: large circle
elements.description: A larger circle is placed nearby, complementing the smaller circle and enhancing the design.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: Another small circle is included, contributing to the overall visual theme.

elements.label: large circle
elements.description: A large circle is depicted, balancing the composition with its size.

elements.label: offer details
elements.description: The text '2-for-1 tonight Free delivery over $15' is prominently displayed in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: The text 'Get offer' is highlighted as a call to action, encouraging user engagement.

elements.label: price tag
elements.description: The price '$4.99' is shown in a bold font, drawing attention to the cost of the offer.
elements.text_content: 2-for-1 tonight Free delivery over $15 $4.99 Get offer

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small 'SALE' badge is positioned at the top right, indicating a promotional offer.
